contact.title: Contact us
contact.placeholderBody: We are setting up this page. A dedicated contact form and support details will appear here soon.

legal.termsPageTitle: Terms of Service — English Studio Japan
legal.termsMetaDescription: Terms of Service for English Studio Japan: use of the service, third parties including Google, lesson recording, and limitation of liability.
legal.privacyMetaDescription: Privacy Policy for English Studio Japan: what we collect, how we use and share data, Google integrations, lesson recording, and your choices.
legal.footerNotice: These documents are provided to explain our practices. They are not a substitute for legal advice. Have qualified counsel review them for your business.

auth.signInSubtitle: Continue with Google to create or access your account.
auth.googleIntro: You don't need a Gmail address—any email you use with Google (for example work or school) is fine to sign up or sign in.
auth.devOnlyHint: Development mode: use any email that exists in the database. Seeded demo teacher:
auth.devSignInError: No user found for that email. Use the seed teacher email or sign in with Google.
auth.devBypassBanner: DEV AUTH BYPASS ACTIVE: Google login is disabled for local testing.
auth.misconfigured: Google sign-in is not configured. Set AUTH_GOOGLE_ID and AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET (or use DEV_AUTH_BYPASS=true in local development).

home.title: Online English lessons
home.subtitle: A simple booking and learning platform for Japanese learners.
home.signedInSubtitle: Book your next lesson, review your schedule, or continue flashcard practice.

landing.metaTitle: English Studio — online lessons for Japanese learners
landing.metaDescription: Find a teacher, book lessons with Google Meet, and keep practicing with flashcards and level check.
landing.heroTitle: Learn English with teachers you trust
landing.heroSubtitle: Book one-on-one lessons, keep a clear schedule, and practice between classes — built for Japanese learners.
landing.step1Body: Browse profiles, specialties, and rates before you book.
landing.step2Body: Pick a time that fits your calendar and complete checkout securely.
landing.step3Body: Meet on Google Meet, then continue with flashcards and your level check.
landing.pillarScheduleBody: See upcoming lessons and export to your calendar.
landing.pillarTeacherBody: Build continuity instead of starting from zero each time.
landing.pillarPracticeBody: Flashcards and placement help you stay on track.
landing.trustLine: Sign in with Google. A Gmail address is not required—any email you use with Google works. Calendar-friendly reminders when you connect Google.

taxonomyPage.title: Class taxonomy
taxonomyPage.description: Configure the class levels and class types your availability slots can be tagged with.
taxonomyPage.name: Name
taxonomyPage.nameHelp: The Japanese name is optional — Japanese-locale users see it when set, otherwise they see the name above.
taxonomyPage.duplicateName: A row with this name already exists. Choose a different name.
taxonomyPage.combinationsHelp: Availability slots can be tagged with any combination below.
taxonomyPage.combinationsEmpty: Add at least one class level and one class type to enable combinations.

dashboard.title: My dashboard
dashboard.placedUnset: Not set — take the level check
dashboard.cancelBookingConfirm: Cancel this lesson? You can still sign up for another slot later.

lessonOfferingsPage.title: Lessons & rates
lessonOfferingsPage.intro: Create the lesson options students can book, including class level, focus, duration, and price.

highlights.pageIntro: Your next lesson, flashcard progress, and a short daily review.
highlights.noNextLesson: No upcoming lesson. Book a slot to keep your routine.
highlights.studyNoActivity: Open Flashcards to start your first practice session.
highlights.profileCardEmpty: Add a short introduction so teachers know you better.
highlights.flashcardStatsIntro: Across your flashcard track: accuracy, response time, and cards flagged weak or mastered.

profilePage.title: Profile
profilePage.intro: Teachers you book with can see your name, photo (from Google), and introduction.
profilePage.shortBioHelp: Up to 300 characters of Markdown — goals, interests, or what you want from lessons.
profilePage.avatarHelp: Your photo comes from your Google account. Update it in Google to change it here.
profilePage.teacherIntro: What you enter here is what students see when they browse teachers and on your public booking page. Your photo still comes from Google — update it in your Google account.
profilePage.teacherRateHelp: Shown on the teacher list and your booking page. Leave empty if you do not want to show a price.
profilePage.teacherRatesByDurationHelp: Choose the lesson lengths you offer and set a price for each.
profilePage.teacherLessonTypeForRateHelp: Pick what this length is for (same categories as your schedule). Students only see lesson types that match what you set here.
profilePage.teacherGroupRatesHelp: Add optional group lesson pricing by group size, duration, and total rate.
profilePage.teacherOffersFreeTrialHelp: If off, students will not be able to select free trial for your lessons.
profilePage.prefillFromGoogle: Suggested from your sign-in (Google) — you can edit before saving.

schedulePage.title: Schedule
schedulePage.intro: See upcoming lessons and add them to your calendar.
schedulePage.availabilityIntro: Set your availability and manage your weekly schedule.
schedulePage.completedIntro: Review past lessons. Your teacher can add session notes and a link to a Google Meet / Gemini recap or other document you open in the browser — we do not host files here.
schedulePage.transcriptLinkHelp: Paste a link only (for example Google Docs or Meet recap). We store the URL, not the file.
schedulePage.lessonNotesHelp: Same editor as your student profile bio — headings, lists, links, and emphasis.
schedulePage.lessonNotesListTip: Lists: each bullet or number is one paragraph. Press Enter between lines. Shift+Enter only adds a line inside the same item—highlighting many lines and clicking the list button won’t split them into separate bullets.
schedulePage.lessonNotesPlaceholder: What you covered, homework, pronunciation tips…
schedulePage.lessonNotesError: Could not save. Check the transcript URL (https only) and try again.
schedulePage.lessonNotesEmptyStudent: Your teacher has not added notes for this lesson yet.
schedulePage.completedLessonsSortHint: Sorted by student, then newest lesson first.

lessonDetail.rescheduleHelp: Updates this booking and sends updated times on Google Calendar to you and the student when calendars are connected.
lessonDetail.rescheduleError: Could not update the time. Try again.
lessonDetail.rescheduleInvalidLocalTime: Enter a valid date and time.
lessonDetail.rescheduleCalendarPartial: The time was saved, but Google Calendar may not have updated. Check Google integration settings.

teacherAvailability.currentAvailabilityPickHint: Pick a time below to edit or remove it.
teacherAvailability.removeDialogDescriptionWeekly: This is a weekly repeating slot. Choose whether to remove only the selected time or the entire weekly rule.
teacherAvailability.removeDialogDescriptionOneOff: This availability happens once. Removing it deletes the slot.
teacherAvailability.removeAllSeries: All times in this weekly rule
teacherAvailability.removeOccurrenceFailed: Could not remove this time. Try again.
teacherAvailability.invalidTimeRange: End time must be after start time on the same day. In the time picker, 12:00 AM is midnight (start of the day)—use 12:00 PM for noon.
teacherAvailability.endTimeHint: End must be later than start the same day. 12:00 AM = midnight; noon is 12:00 PM.
teacherAvailability.monthAddModalSubtitle: One-off by default. Turn on weekly repeat to make this happen every week. Calendar day: {date}.
teacherAvailability.repeatWeeklyHint: Off creates one availability on this date. On repeats every week on this calendar weekday.
teacherAvailability.weeklyDateRangeHint: From defaults to the selected day. Leave Until blank to repeat indefinitely.
teacherAvailability.invalidDateRange: Until must be on or after From.
teacherAvailability.invalidLessonMeta: Pick both a class level and a class type for every slot.
teacherAvailability.taxonomyMissingWarning: You have no class levels or types yet. Add them under Taxonomy first.

quickReview.title: Quick review
quickReview.subtitle: {count} / {max} cards today · {date}
quickReview.deckHint: Mini flashcards — tap a card to flip.
quickReview.tapToReveal: Tap to show the English answer.
quickReview.tapToHide: Tap again to show the Japanese prompt.
quickReview.empty: Practice a few flashcards first — quick review uses cards you have already answered correctly.
quickReview.clearedForToday: You have cleared today’s quick review slots (or no more eligible cards are left). Come back tomorrow for a fresh set.

integrationsPage.title: Google connections
integrationsPage.intro: Connect only what you need. Calendar is used for Meet links; Drive and Meet artifacts are optional for lesson materials.
integrationsPage.calendarPreviewHint: This preview uses Google’s embed. If it looks empty, open Google Calendar → Settings for your calendar → Access permissions and allow embedding, or open your calendar in a new tab.

teacherHome.title: Dashboard
teacherHome.body: Lesson booking and classroom tools are here. Student flashcards: Learn → Flashcards.
teacherHome.calendarDisconnected: Not connected yet. Connect your calendar to auto-create Meet links for lessons.
teacherHome.calendarConnected: Connected. Meet links can be created automatically for your bookings.
teacherHome.calendarFailedToast: Could not connect Google Calendar. Please try again.
teacherHome.calendarSetupHint: Connect Google Calendar there so confirmed bookings can create Meet links automatically.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.noReviewItems: No students currently require placement review.
admin.noPermission: You do not have access to this page.

schoolsPage.title: Schools & organizations
schoolsPage.subtitle: Create organizations, add schools, and assign owners and admins.
schoolsPage.none: No organizations yet. Create one below.
schoolsPage.createHelp: Creates the org, its first school, and assigns the given user as OWNER.
schoolsPage.deleteConfirmPrompt: Type {slug} below to permanently delete this organization. This also deletes all its schools, members, and schedule data.
schoolsPage.slugInvalidEmpty: Slug must contain letters or numbers.

reportsPage.title: Chat reports
reportsPage.subtitle: Threads where a participant reported the conversation.

userDetail.title: User
userDetail.deleteConfirm: Type the user email to confirm deletion.
userDetail.name: Name

booking.title: Book a lesson
booking.teacherBrowseSubtitle: Browse teachers and open a profile to schedule with them.
booking.teacherFreeTrialUnavailable: This teacher does not offer a free trial lesson.
booking.guestFilterHint: Sign in to filter teachers by specialty or language.
booking.publicBookingTeaser: You can read this profile without signing in. Sign in with Google when you are ready to choose a time and book a lesson.
booking.publicBookingCta: Sign in to book a lesson
booking.checkoutSummary: Confirm and pay to secure your lesson slot.
booking.leadTimeError: Bookings must be made at least 48 hours in advance.
booking.leadTimeNotice: Only lesson slots at least 48 hours in advance are available for booking.
booking.manualOverrideHelp: Allows booking inside 48 hours when explicitly checked.
booking.manualOverrideReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this exception is needed...

placement.pageIntro: About 15–25 minutes. Your answers help us suggest a starting level and lesson plan.
placement.title: Level placement
placement.loadError: Could not load the placement activity.
placement.cooldownBody: You already completed a placement test. You can take it again on or after {date}.
placement.timeExpired: Time is up. Please restart the placement test.
placement.submitWhenReady: Submit now to calculate your placement.
placement.manualReviewNotice: Your placement is marked for teacher review due to mixed indicators. We will still suggest a starting level now and can adjust after review.

writingFeedback.writingTooShort: Your writing is too short. Expand your ideas with examples and reasons.
writingFeedback.prepositionRisk: Review common preposition usage in collocations.
writingFeedback.goodTaskCompletion: You addressed the task clearly and sufficiently.
writingFeedback.strongCoherence: Your writing shows good coherence with linking words.

study.title: Flashcards
study.subtitle: All track levels are listed below. Practice any level that is unlocked for you—usually from your placement band upward, or after you pass the previous level’s exit test. Earn XP for your study rank as you go.
study.reorderInstructions: Drag the tiles into the correct order, then check your answer.
study.multiStepInstructions: Complete each step in order, then submit.
study.sessionEmpty: No practice items for this level yet.
study.passedUnlock: You passed! The next level is unlocked.
study.failedTest: Not quite. Keep practicing and try again.
study.practiceFocusHint: Target weak cards for extra repeats, or review mastered cards.
study.queueEmptyWeak: No weak cards yet — keep practicing!
study.queueEmptyMastered: No mastered cards yet — answer a few correctly in a row to build mastery.

onboarding.title: Welcome to English Studio
onboarding.subtitle: Complete your onboarding to continue to your dashboard.
onboarding.timezoneHelp: Auto-detected from your browser. Change it here anytime.
onboarding.acceptTerms: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms>
onboarding.saveError: Could not save onboarding details. Try again.
onboarding.nextSubtitle: You can take the placement test now, or skip for now and choose a teacher first.
onboarding.skipForNowHint: You can come back and finish these later from your dashboard.
onboarding.allDoneHint: Everything looks good. You can continue to your dashboard.
onboarding.takePlacementNowHelp: Get your suggested level before booking.
onboarding.chooseTeacherNowHelp: Skip for now and select a teacher/lesson slot.

profile.title: Set up your profile
profile.body: Add your intro so teachers understand your goals.

integrations.title: Connect Google
integrations.body: Enable calendar sync and faster scheduling.

bookLesson.title: Find a teacher and book a lesson
bookLesson.body: Compare teachers, then pick a lesson type and time slot.

chat.title: Use teacher chat
chat.body: Coordinate with teachers before and after lessons.

placement.title: Take placement test
placement.body: Get your suggested level before you continue.

materials.title: Open learning materials
materials.body: Start with flashcard lessons between bookings.

onboarding.teacherSubtitle: Complete this once to unlock your teacher dashboard and student workflows.
onboarding.teacherResumeHint: You are still in teacher onboarding.
onboarding.resumeHint: You are still setting up your account.

profile.title: Update your public profile
profile.body: Add your bio and credentials so students know who they will learn with.

integrations.title: Connect Google
integrations.body: Link your Google account for calendar sync and Meet event handling.

availability.title: Set your availability
availability.body: Publish at least one schedule block so students can book lessons.

students.title: Review student profiles
students.body: Check goals and context on student profiles before lessons.

chat.title: Use chat with students
chat.body: Use the chat panel to coordinate before and after lessons.

notes.title: Post lesson notes/documents
notes.body: After lessons, add completion notes and external recap links.

materials.title: Explore learning materials
materials.body: Understand the flashcard materials students use between lessons.

chat.title: Messages
chat.unreadBadgeLabel: {count, plural, one {# unread message} other {# unread messages}}
chat.readOnlyHint: Read-only until teacher/admin enables two-way chat.
chat.reportPrompt: Please share what happened. This report will be reviewed.
chat.blockedHint: This conversation is blocked. Messaging is disabled.
chat.blockedComposerHint: You cannot send messages while this conversation is blocked.
chat.broadcastPanelHint: Send a separate announcement message to a selected audience.
chat.broadcastLeftPanelHint: Broadcast mode: conversation/contact lists are hidden.
chat.archiveConfirm: Archive this conversation from your list?
chat.adminReviewOnlyHint: Review mode: admin sending is disabled here.
chat.directPanelHint: Send a direct message to the selected contact.

createPage.title: Create organization
createPage.description: Set up a new organization with your first school.
createPage.orgSlugHelp: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
createPage.error: Could not create organization. Try again.

schoolsPage.title: Schools
schoolsPage.name: Name
schoolsPage.slugInvalidEmpty: Slug must contain letters or numbers.

membersPage.title: Members
membersPage.description: View and manage organization members across all schools.
membersPage.name: Name
membersPage.removeConfirm: Remove this member from the organization?

classesPage.title: Classes
classesPage.description: Browse upcoming classes and join open slots.

schedulePage.title: Schedule
schedulePage.noClassLevels: No class levels configured. Add one in school settings.
schedulePage.noClassTypes: No class types configured. Add one in school settings.
schedulePage.classTaxonomyRequired: Class level and type are both required.
schedulePage.taxonomyMissingWarning: This school has no class levels or types yet — add them in school settings before creating slots.

pricingPage.title: Pricing
pricingPage.description: Set lesson pricing for this school.

timeOffPage.title: Time off
timeOffPage.description: Review and manage teacher time-off requests.

taxonomyPage.title: Class taxonomy
taxonomyPage.description: Configure the class levels and class types that schedule slots can be tagged with.
taxonomyPage.name: Name
taxonomyPage.nameHelp: The Japanese name is optional — Japanese-locale users see it when set, otherwise they see the name above.
taxonomyPage.duplicateName: A row with this name already exists. Choose a different name.
taxonomyPage.combinationsHelp: Schedule slots can be tagged with any combination below.
taxonomyPage.combinationsEmpty: Add at least one class level and one class type to enable combinations.

applyPage.title: Apply to {school}
applyPage.description: Submit an application to join {org}. An admin will review and respond.
applyPage.notePlaceholder: Why you'd like to join, your goals, scheduling preferences…
applyPage.submitted: Your application has been submitted. We'll let you know when it's reviewed.
applyPage.notEnabled: This school is not accepting applications right now.
applyPage.alreadyMember: You are already an active member of this school.

invitePage.title: Accept invitation
invitePage.description: You have been invited to join {org}.
invitePage.alreadyUsed: This invitation has already been used.
